events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from CPMC Van Ness for client 1050. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 500 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Filipino; dislikes beef, tofu. Cooking ability: stovetop. 5 meals/week, zone Tenderloin.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Lumpiang Sariwa
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Pork Sinigang with Brown Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Low-Sodium Chicken Adobo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 426/500 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Baked Bangus with Garlic Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 396/500 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/500 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1050 added to route R-TEND-1 (Tenderloin), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1050: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
